changes: Cancel friend request now uses a robust POST action instead of relying on DELETE request bodies.
Friend request rows expose a stable requestId to the client for cancellation.
Cancelling a pending request also cleans legacy direct friend rows when no accepted request exists.
Cancel buttons are guarded against mobile double tap/click events.
tests: Syntaxe JS OK : app.js, app-core.js, hd-api.js, service-worker.js
Annulation friend request : POST action=cancel côté API
Client : boutons Annuler protégés contre double tap mobile
